# Scenario (d): marker-new-write-stays-new
#
# Pre-state: project has `.ndf/cli/install.json` only. No `.ndf.json`
# at the project root.
#
# Verifies: a CLI write (via `ndf config set fieldnotes-repo …`)
# updates the NEW marker in place. The OLD path remains absent.
#
# Expected behavior post-write:
# - `.ndf/cli/install.json` exists with the new fieldnotes_repo value.
# - `.ndf.json` at the project root does NOT exist (write target is
#   pure-NEW; nothing creates the OLD path under v2.5.0+).
